prerequisite_reason: Bank-Grade certifiable score 2.2 < 9.0 required for Government-Grade. All higher-grade external blockers cascade. G-GAP assessed for readiness only.

external_dependencies.blocker: No SITA framework engagement; no SSP; no 3PAO
No personnel security policy; no clearances obtained
No 24/7 SOC operational; no SIEM integration
Zero-trust configured but not operationally validated by red team

controls.name: Bank-Grade prerequisite
controls.evidence: B-GAP preliminary 3.6, final 2.2. Far below 9.0 threshold.

controls.name: FedRAMP Moderate (or SITA equivalent)
controls.evidence: No SITA framework agreement; no 3PAO engagement; no System Security Plan (SSP); no control implementation evidence for 325 FedRAMP Moderate controls.
controls.raw_output: find docs/compliance/: no ssp-fedramp.md, no sita-framework.md, no 3pao docs

controls.name: FIPS 140-2 Level 3 (or L2 with HSM)
controls.evidence: FIPS assessment doc exists; AWS KMS uses FIPS endpoints; no CloudHSM or HSM backing; no CMVP certificate.
controls.raw_output: docs/security/fips-assessment.md exists; infra/terraform/environments/production/main.tf: use_fips_endpoint; no hsm/cloudhsm references

controls.name: Supply chain SBOM + attestation
controls.evidence: Cosign CI integration for artifact signing; SBOM generation referenced (syft); Docker base images pinned by digest; reproducible builds script exists.
controls.raw_output: docs/security/cosign-ci-integration.md; .github/workflows/ references syft/sbom; build:reproducible script; SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH support

controls.name: Citizenship / security clearance for critical roles
controls.evidence: Personnel security policy published (clearance levels Baseline/Confidential/Secret/Top Secret, pre-employment vetting, foreign national policy, ongoing security, termination procedures, third-party personnel). Clearances not yet obtained for any critical roles.

controls.raw_output: find docs/: no personnel-security-policy.md; no hr/ directory with clearance references

controls.name: Data sovereignty (no cross-border without MoU)
controls.evidence: All production in af-south-1; data-residency-proof.md exists; cross-border transfer policy referenced in data-retention-policy.md (POPIA S72); DPIA drafted.

controls.name: Air-gapped deployment option
controls.evidence: Air-gapped deployment architecture published (network segmentation, component mapping, artifact supply chain, validation procedure, implementation roadmap). Offline-first architecture exists. No physical air-gapped environment built yet (target 2027-Q2).

controls.raw_output: docs/architecture/offline-architecture.md: offline-first 14-day target; no air-gapped-deployment.md; no harbor/mirror config

controls.name: 99.99% uptime SLA (52.6m downtime/year)
controls.evidence: Multi-region architecture spec exists (multi-region Terraform module) but not fully operational; SLO targets at 99.5% pilot moving to 99.9%; no 6-month historical uptime evidence supporting 99.99%.
controls.raw_output: infra/terraform/modules/multi-region/ exists; docs/operations/slo-definitions.md: 99.5% pilot, 99.9% production target; no 99.99% evidence

controls.name: Continuous monitoring + SIEM
controls.evidence: SOC operations plan published (L1–L5 maturity model, staffing model, technology stack, detection coverage, metrics/SLAs, implementation roadmap). No 24/7 SOC operational yet; no SIEM integration (Splunk/Elastic/Sentinel) live; threat intel feeds not configured. Target operational: 2027-Q1.
controls.raw_output: find docs/devops/: no soc-operations.md; find infra/monitoring/: no siem config; Prometheus/Grafana/Alertmanager active

controls.name: Zero-trust architecture (mTLS, micro-segmentation)
controls.evidence: Linkerd mTLS configs prepared for 16 services; NetworkPolicies exist (deny-all + explicit allow); zero-trust assessment doc exists; sidecar injection scheduled Q3 2026. Not yet operationally validated by red team.

controls.name: King IV governance compliance
controls.evidence: Board Security Committee Charter exists (CISO, CEO, Independent Director, External Advisor). CISO role definition published. No standalone King IV mapping doc; no ethics policy; no separate audit committee terms.

controls.raw_output: docs/compliance/board-security-committee-charter.md exists; no king-iv-compliance.md; no ethics-policy.md; no audit-committee-terms.md

controls.name: POPIA + FICA + PAIA compliance
controls.evidence: POPIA registration doc published (IR-REF-2026-0315-GTCX); ROPA completed (6 activities); breach notification procedure published; FICA compliance framework published; PAIA manual published. POPIA Information Officer pending appointment. FIC registration as Accountable Institution not yet started.
controls.raw_output: docs/compliance/popia-registration.md, popia-ropa.md, popia-breach-notification.md, fica-compliance.md, paia-manual.md all published

recommendations: Achieve Bank-Grade certification before pursuing government contracts.
Engage SITA framework and begin FedRAMP Moderate / SITA equivalent SSP.
Deploy AWS CloudHSM or on-prem HSM for FIPS 140-2 Level 3 key generation.
Establish 24/7 SOC with SIEM integration and threat intel feeds.
Operationalize zero-trust mTLS mesh (Q3 2026) and validate with red team.
